name: aoa-shared-launchers
description: Installable AoA launcher skills for workspace orientation, growth snapshots, seed routing, and Codex wiring diagnosis.

interface.longDescription: Bundles shared AoA launcher skills that rely on project-scoped MCP surfaces for workspace orientation, derived observability, seed routing, and wiring diagnosis.
defaultPrompt: Use AoA Shared Launchers to map which repo owns this cross-repo task and propose one bounded move.
Use AoA Shared Launchers to produce a growth snapshot across workspace, stats, and seed route context.
